title: Better Crafts
description: This is a mod that allows more crafting recipes in Minecraft. (Currently 7 Recipes)
body:
# NO LONGER SUPPORTED

Old Desc:

Better Crafting is a mod that allows, hence the name, better crafting.

This mod changes the recipes to enhance the experience, or just recipes that should just be in the game.

Currently, There Are 7 Crafting Recipes



If for some reason you dont want it here:

Curseforge - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/crafting-enhanced
